message:
Fix GNOME 50 API incompatibilities found in integration testing

- Replace global.display.get_monitor_workarea() (doesn't exist) with
  workspace.get_work_area_for_monitor()
- Replace global.display.get_monitor_connector() (doesn't exist) with
  Main.layoutManager.monitors[i].connector (with fallback)
- Fix relocatable GSettings schema lookup to use extension's schema
  source directory instead of system-wide path
- Fix grab-op-begin signal handler to handle both 2-param and 3-param
  signatures (get_grab_op() doesn't exist in GNOME 50)

Verified: extension enables (state 1) and disables (state 2) cleanly
in headless gnome-shell --virtual-monitor 1920x1080 with no errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
